name: Chandra Bhongir
headline: Senior Systems Engineer at United States Space Force

workHistory.title: Principal Investigator for IR&D responsible for design and development of common, reusable Modular Avionics Architecture (MAA) framework for use across various tactical fighter aircraft platforms.

name: Nikhil Nilakantan
headline: General Manager, Product & Engineering Exec at Amazon.

workHistory.title: Global Head of Reading Growth, Amazon Kindle
workHistory.company: I currently lead multiple high growth Amazon Device, Entertainment, and Stores business lines – Fire TV, Prime Video, Alexa, Fire Tablet, IMDb, Audio Ads, and Grocery (in-store and online). Previously led display ad supply & monetization for Amazon.com/Amazon mobile apps, and vertical ad programs for Books Ads, Pharma & Healthcare, Amazon Business and Local Ads. Responsible for all aspects of the business including multi-Billion $ P&L growing at high double-digit CAGR, and demand growth (5x active advertisers in 4 years). Own the vision, product strategy, roadmap, and delivery of all advertising product lines in each area – search advertising, brand shopping, and display advertising across web, mobile, devices, video, audio etc. This includes all advertiser and consumer facing features WW, and all GTM and demand generation activities.

workHistory.title: moreTap Inc.
workHistory.company: Glass was an iPhone app that promoted discovery of clothing & accessories across the long tail of fashion stores in the US. At the time, 98% of fashion oriented stores in the US did not publish product inventory information. We built a product discovery layer on top of the social graph that gathered, geo-coded, and categorized product data from >10x more stores than the competition i.e. even across the long tail of ~300K stores with only 1 to 3 locations.

workHistory.title: Co-Founder & CEO
workHistory.company: Founder of moreTap Inc.  moreTap developed and launched a white-label iOS, Android application platform that improved the attendee experience for conferences and live events, while providing better communication and analytics for the organizer.

workHistory.title: Inventive Path provided specialized consulting services to the technology industry - Software, Internet, Consumer Electronics and Hardware. Focused on Product Innovation, Strategy, Marketing, and Product Management.
Sr. Manager, Software Quality
workHistory.company: Founding PM for the TI-Nspire line of graphing calculators that I helped launch globally. Overall responsibility for developing and communicating the vision, strategy, requirements and product roadmaps for desktop and embedded handheld Software applications, systems software, Software Development Kit (SDK) and Content Development Kit (CDK). Explored new methods of delivering digital content over the web to handheld products. Designed and owned Internationalization & Localization strategies for new products targeted at non-US markets. Used various market and customer analysis techniques to gather requirements from customers in the US, Europe, Asia and Australia. Helped isolate new product/market opportunities, defined ROI, value proposition and positioning. Interfaced with product development to ensure delivery of the right product to customers.
